audit_scope: living parity manifest for pinned upstream audit status and Python runtime implementation status

module_lifecycle.completion_policy: A module can only move to parity when its pinned upstream refs, copied assets or schemas, request/tool surface, runtime semantics, state/event behavior, and tests are all passed or explicitly not_applicable. Partial modules must name the next gate instead of being treated as complete.

pinned_upstream.next_gate: Keep pinned commit fixed until the user explicitly asks to rebase.

upstream_refs: public python package requirement from this port
package_layout.next_gate: No further layout work unless new modules are added.

parity_framework.next_gate: Each future module batch must update this manifest and pass python -m codex parity check.

prompt_assets.next_gate: Asset copy parity is done; prompt assembly parity is tracked separately.

prompt_assembly.next_gate: Default exec prompt/request contract is complete, including auto base-instruction lookup from the pinned upstream model catalog; conditional apps/skills/plugins/realtime fragments remain tracked outside this module.

request_shape.next_gate: Core Responses request fields, follow-up item serialization, model-catalog reasoning effort/summary defaults, verbosity defaults, model-catalog parallel tool-call defaults, official-home config loading, and ContextManager-style prompt history normalization are covered. Remaining request-shape gaps are websocket/remote compaction transport fields tracked by later modules.

tool_surface.next_gate: Tool name surface is fixed; runtime semantics remain a separate module.

tool_runtime.next_gate: Unified exec/write_stdin/update_plan, local freeform apply_patch, apply_patch workspace-write path bounds/change metadata/turn-diff tracking/partial-failure committed deltas/shell-heredoc normalization, provider-backed sandbox/default approvals, permission-request hook events, session approval cache, on-failure sandbox-denial retry, macOS seatbelt argv transformation/metadata, view_image processing/catalog gating, request_user_input provider flow plus local CLI answer bridge, local multi-agent v1, and ordered parallel tool dispatch/drain are closer to upstream; remaining gates are full platform sandbox enforcement on every supported OS/environment, complete apply_patch hook/verification semantics, and exact ratatui/app-server request_user_input overlay replay/resolution semantics.

hosted_tools.next_gate: Web search hosted tool shape, filters, user location, context size, content types, profile/config mode loading, and history preservation are covered; remaining hosted-tool gaps are backend entitlement/capability normalization, full upstream requirement fallback, and image_generation out-of-scope support.

session_lifecycle.next_gate: Default exec lifecycle now streams item started/delta/completed/token-count events, aggregates streamed active-item deltas, emits apply-patch turn_diff events, retries retryable stream failures with upstream-style stream_error diagnostics and sampling request replay, drains active-turn pending input before follow-up sampling, runs a local hook_provider for session/user/pending/pre-tool/post-tool/permission-request/pre-compact/post-compact/stop/after-agent gates with hook context injection, persists upstream-style interrupted-turn markers, strips Plan-mode proposed-plan markup from visible assistant text, and has no default fixed iteration cap while retaining an optional debug/test cap; remaining gaps are plan TurnItem streaming, websocket transport fallback, and full TUI draft-restore semantics.

state_rollout.next_gate: Default exec rollout persistence and reconstruction are complete; DB thread-store indexing remains outside this lightweight Python core.

memory.next_gate: MemoryStateStore now participates in automatic root-session startup when the feature is enabled; startup can run in a detached local background task with thread-store metadata backfill, source/idle/age/current-thread filtered claims, prune, rate-limit guard, Phase 1, and Phase 2. Remaining gaps are exact spawned-agent heartbeat/completion wiring, MCP server_pollutes_memory handling, exact Rust state-runtime backfill/preview/thread-index semantics, and exact git utility semantics for Phase 2 workspace diffs.

compaction.next_gate: Local manual/auto compaction now covers model-catalog context-window limits, streamed token usage, upstream-ordered pre-sampling compaction before current context/user input, last-API-usage-plus-local-items accounting, mid-turn follow-up compaction, previous-model downshift compaction, and pre/post compact hook gates that can inject context or abort. OpenAI-style /responses/compact remote compaction now sends the upstream endpoint payload shape, processes replacement history, and can fall back to local prompt compact in auto mode. Remaining gaps are image-specific token-estimator adjustments, websocket reset semantics, remote compaction v2, remote trace checkpoint recording, and upstream's own TODO for pending incoming context/user estimation.

cli_exec.next_gate: Useful exec args, aliases, JSON events, non-JSON stderr progress rendering, color auto/always/never, cell spacing, active CJK-aware wrapping with continuation indentation, full-cell agent message indentation, work-before-answer separators, lightweight Markdown human rendering with upstream-style boxed/wrapped table rendering and markdown-fence table unwrapping, indented reasoning/thinking cells, upstream-style plan-update/web-search/request-user-input history cells, upstream-style apply_patch file-change blocks, final-message stream deduplication, a partial upstream TUI-style ExecCell renderer for Ran/Explored/Read/List/Search with command continuation gutters and middle output truncation, normalized trace summaries, last-message output, output schema, image attachments, config.toml profile loading, dotted -c overrides, local rollout resume/fork, OSS provider CLI/config selection, bracketed-paste-aware multiline interactive input, basic cursor editing, bottom-anchored live Working/Compacting status rows with elapsed time, API-backed context token display, logical session-context carryover across compactions, and cumulative API-backed session reasoning token usage, running-turn pending input submission, local request_user_input prompting with arrow-key option selection and Other freeform notes, an upstream-derived slash-command catalog that prevents known/unknown commands from leaking to the model, local /status, /rollout, /resume, and /fork, upstream-style /compact result rendering plus queued /compact dispatch after an active turn, /plan and /default interactive mode switching including /plan <prompt> inline submission, prompt erase-on-submit to avoid duplicate user-message echo, and a partial Esc interrupt path for local model/tool work are covered. The earlier Python curses full-screen experiment is removed from the default path because it was not an upstream-equivalent port of the ratatui product surface. Remaining CLI gaps are the real ratatui-style interactive shell: exact layout/colors, exact status row shimmer/details/timer scheduling, Shift+Tab mode cycling, full composer editing/keybindings/history search/paste placeholders/attachments, active transcript rewriting, approval overlays, full implementation of popup-backed slash commands (/model, /permissions, /mcp, /apps, /plugins, /agent, /side, /goal, /theme, /pets, etc.), exact ratatui resume/fork picker visuals, exact request_user_input overlay/replay UI including unanswered-confirmation and notes layout parity, complete model-transport cancellation parity, a full port of codex-rs/shell-command parse_command.rs, app-server/thread-store resume names, full upstream config surface/permission profiles, local OSS provider transport/readiness, upstream exit-code edge cases, and automated official Codex oracle runs for trace comparison.

upstream_refs: codex-rs/core MCP and plugin dynamic tool paths
mcp_plugins.next_gate: Keep out of default exec parity until core lifecycle is stable.

hosted_tools.name: web_search
hosted_tools.notes: Hosted Responses API tool emitted as web_search_call items.

memory.read_path: memory_summary.md developer instructions are injected only when MemoryTool and use_memories are enabled; assistant memory citations are parsed and hidden from visible text
memory.write_path: Phase 1 and Phase 2 prompt assets plus prompt builders are present; native Python sessions now persist upstream-shaped session_meta, turn_context, event_msg, response_item, and compacted JSONL lines; rollout JSONL can still load upstream response_item lines and legacy local item.completed lines, filter with the upstream memory persistence policy shape, retain environment context, apply upstream secret redaction, and feed the strict-schema Phase 1 extractor; Stage 1 startup backfills lightweight thread metadata, claims DB jobs with source/idle/age/current-thread filters before model extraction, and automatic root-session startup runs when the feature is enabled; web_search/tool_search external context can mark threads polluted when configured; raw_memories.md and rollout_summaries files can be rebuilt from Stage 1 records; phase2_workspace_diff.md can be rendered/written from a supplied diff or from the current memory workspace git baseline diff; Phase 2 can run through the startup pipeline or explicitly in a locked-down CodexSession; detached local background startup and rate-limit guard parity are present; full spawned-agent lifecycle, exact heartbeat behavior, and MCP-specific pollution are still partial

core_modules.cli.py: python -m codex exec subset with JSONL, profile/config loading, dotted -c overrides, output schema, images, local rollout resume, OSS provider flags, and last-message output
core_modules.core.py: session and follow-up tool-call loop with active-turn pending input and interrupt abort markers
core_modules.model.py: OpenAI Responses API wrapper plus scripted fake model
core_modules.memory.py: Memory rollout loader/filter, Phase 1 output schema, request builder, parser, explicit extractor, upstream secret redaction, thread-store metadata backfill and source/idle/age/current-thread filtered DB startup claims, DB-claimed startup pipeline, detached background startup task, rate-limit guard, automatic session startup hook support, Stage 1 storage file helpers, Phase 2 workspace git baseline/diff rendering, and explicit consolidation session runner
core_modules.tools.py: compact native tool registry and handlers
core_modules.state.py: in-memory history plus upstream-shaped rollout JSONL scaffold
core_modules.prompts.py: copied prompt assets, simplified base instruction assembly, and Memory read/write prompt builders
core_modules.types.py: config, lifecycle, event, result, and prompt request dataclasses
core_modules.parity.py: local parity framework checks plus official codex CLI oracle helper

exec_command.notes: Uses upstream-style response text, yield bounds, byte-level output capture, real PTY for tty=true on Unix, tty-gated stdin, approval/retry paths, macOS seatbelt argv transformation when available, and structured rollout metadata; full cross-platform sandbox orchestration remains partial.

write_stdin.notes: Uses upstream-style response text, tty gating, terminal_interaction rollout events, and final exec_command_end when a local session exits; still local-subprocess only.

search_files.notes: Not an upstream Codex default tool; removed from the runtime after initially being added by mistake.

apply_patch.notes: Copied grammar is executable for local add/update/delete patches, including upstream overwrite, move, A/M/D summary, verify-before-write handling for predictable correctness errors, runtime committed-delta turn_diff events, shell heredoc normalization from supported exec_command invocations, configured workspace-write path bounds, plus git-diff fallback; exact approval/orchestrator hooks and full codex_apply_patch grammar/runtime semantics remain incomplete.

update_plan.notes: Returns upstream `Plan updated`, rejects Plan mode, and persists plan_update EventMsg; richer UI plan state remains incomplete.

view_image.notes: Validates detail, decodes images, preserves bounded PNG/JPEG/WebP bytes, resizes larger images to the upstream 2048 max dimension, returns data-url image content metadata, honors upstream model-catalog original-detail support, and returns the upstream unsupported-image-input error when configured.

shell_command.notes: No longer exposed by default on non-Windows. Full upstream shell tool type/config parity is still incomplete.

request_user_input.notes: Schema, default unavailable-in-Default-mode handler, normalized isOther flag, local provider response path, local CLI answer bridge, and upstream-style result history cell are present. Exact ratatui overlay/app-server replay and resolution semantics remain incomplete.

spawn_agent.notes: Model-visible schema is present and local Python subagent sessions can spawn/run in background; app-server/cloud thread management and full recursive worker semantics remain incomplete.

send_input.notes: Model-visible schema is present and local Python subagent sessions accept queued follow-up input; true interruption semantics remain incomplete.

resume_agent.notes: Model-visible schema is present and local closed-agent state can be reopened; app-server persistence remains incomplete.

wait_agent.notes: Model-visible schema is present and local waits return running/completed/errored/not_found statuses.

close_agent.notes: Model-visible schema is present and local agents can be marked shutdown; hard cancellation of running child work remains incomplete.

web_search.notes: Hosted tool spec is present with external_web_access, filters, user_location, search_context_size, search_content_types, and web_search_call items are preserved in history. Full upstream config/profile mode resolution and backend entitlement normalization remain incomplete.
